title: Implement keyword search with RPC
goal: Enable real database search when user provides ?q=<query> parameter
constraints: Do NOT change existing ToolCard component
Do NOT remove or disable AI classification system
Do NOT modify routing or navigation logic
acceptance_criteria: When ?q=<query> present, searchTools is called instead of classify
Results displayed in same ToolCard grid as before
Error handling shows searchError when search fails
Retry button calls searchTools again for keyword search
No lint errors when running pnpm lint

checks.name: Uses correct RPC
checks.expected: RPC call found with correct parameters

checks.name: Effect triggers search
checks.expected: Effect calls searchTools with correct parameters

notes: This task implements a working keyword search feature
The old AI classification system remains untouched (isStackMode = false for now)
Race condition risk is low because navigation is on-click, not live
Future improvement: add timeout handling on searchTools
Search results use same ToolCard component, no UI changes needed
